summary: Completed testing of PVP Matchmaking system with PhotoSelector and RPS Power Advantage features. All 26 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI renders correctly on desktop and mobile. Create Game flow works end-to-end.
seed_data_creation: Test user testplayer@blendlink.com has 10 minted photos with dollar values from $444K to $4.3M
context_for_next_testing_agent: PVP matchmaking system is fully functional. All features tested: PVP Menu (3 options), PhotoSelector (10 photos sorted by value, 5-photo selection, stamina validation), Game Settings panel (bet input, bot fallback toggle), Create Game API. RPS Power Advantage code is implemented in BattleArena.jsx and RPSBidding.jsx - calculates based on effective photo values and shows +$1M bonus indicator with $6M bid option when player has advantage.

backend_apis: POST /api/photo-game/open-games/create - Create open game (validates 5 photos, ownership, stamina)
GET /api/photo-game/battle-photos - Returns 10 photos sorted by dollar value with stamina
frontend_components: PVP Menu - 3 options: Create New Game, Browse & Join Games, Practice Mode (Single Photo)
PhotoSelector - Shows all 10 photos sorted by value, allows selecting exactly 5 photos
PhotoSelector - Stamina validation (24/24 for all photos)
PhotoSelector - Selection counter (0/5 to 5/5), Total Value display
Game Settings panel - Appears when 5 photos selected
Game Settings - BL Coin Bet input with +10, +50, +100 quick buttons
Create Game button - Creates open game via API
RPS Power Advantage - Code implemented in BattleArena.jsx (calculatePowerAdvantage helper)
RPS Power Advantage - RPSBidding.jsx shows +$1M bonus indicator and $6M bid option
Mobile responsiveness - All components render correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)
